title: Long Text Field on Tables
excerpt: I’d like to be able to adjust the view on boards to better view long-text fields that are on the upper end of the character limit without needing to hover to read the text. This could involve increasing the row height, b…

posts.author: amandab (Amanda Barber)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to be able to adjust the view on boards to better view long-text fields that are on the upper end of the character limit without needing to hover to read the text. This could involve increasing the row height, but in some instances increasing the row width really doesn’t work with standard screen widths.
